title: senna pentagonia
intro: Senna pentagonia, also known as the tropical senna, is a plant species that belongs to the legume family and is native to tropical regions. The plant contains anthraquinone glycosides, which are responsible for its medicinal properties, including laxative and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Senna pentagonia include treating constipation, diarrhea, and various skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or powder, and is also used in herbal remedies, often in combination with other plants, to treat these conditions.
